gate:adr: ADR 0002 records the external browser certification adapter and its unchanged authority boundaries
gate:architecture: Architecture evidence and policy tests prove Playwright uses only public web/API surfaces and adds no runtime owner
gate:release-certification: Pinned static, two-pass hermetic Compose, and clean Journey 11 gates retain a hashed machine manifest
gate:security-privacy: Normal server sessions, direct 403 assertions, isolated state, and synthetic-only retained media are certified
risk:auditability: Captured immutable v1 and distinct v2 hashes are matched to final read-only audit trails with retained trace and screenshots
risk:human-authority: Five distinct personas use normal login/logout and only their server-authorized lifecycle actions
